# HPD.ML.LightGBM.LightGbmLearner

- Package: `HPD-ML-LightGBM` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.LightGBM`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.LightGBM`
- Kind: `class`
- Guide: [Related documentation](../../../training/lightgbm/index.md)

LightGBM gradient boosted decision tree learner. Supports binary classification, multiclass, regression, and ranking via a single class with configurable objective.
